positive: Minimalist, stylized illustration of a mountain range at sunrise, featuring clean, geometric silhouettes of jagged peaks and ancient trees. The color palette should use high-contrast, earthy tones—deep indigo blues, burnt orange, and warm slate grey. The composition must be centered, ideal for a repeating apparel print, with defined foreground and background layers. The style should evoke modern nature-core graphics, emphasizing clear lines and negative space. Use bold, solid color blocking with crisp edges, suitable for screen printing, evoking the feeling of a serene adventure.
negative: photorealistic, blur, watermark, logo, text, signature, poor anatomy, artifacts, messy, cluttered, low detail, noise
